items.text: Refunds for overpayments from the Anderson Hall vending machines are available at the Facilities Office, Room 204. Requests must be submitted by March 3-7 between 9:00 AM and 3:00 PM. Maximum refund amount is $2. Bring your receipt.

questions.stem: According to the notice, what is required to receive a refund?

options.A: To visit the vending machine directly
options.C: To submit your request by March 3-7
options.D: To contact the vending machine company

questions.explanation: The notice states that requests must be submitted by March 3-7 between 9:00 AM and 3:00 PM.

questions.stem: According to the notice, what must be brought when requesting a refund?

options.C: A written explanation of the error

questions.explanation: The notice explicitly says to bring your receipt.

items.text:
Hi everyone,
The Environmental Club meeting has been rescheduled to this Friday at 4:00 PM in Room 302 of the Science Building. Please bring your project ideas. Sorry for the change.
Best,
Dr. Chen

questions.stem: When will the rescheduled Environmental Club meeting take place?
questions.explanation: The email states the meeting is rescheduled to this Friday at 4:00 PM.

questions.stem: What can be inferred about the original meeting time?

options.A: It was scheduled for later this week
options.B: It was held in the same building
options.C: It was changed due to a conflict

questions.explanation: The email apologizes for the change, implying a conflict or scheduling issue.

items.text: Taco Tuesday is here early! The Green Truck is at South Lot B today with a $3 special on chicken tacos! Seriously, best lunch deal on campus. Come grab one before they run out!

questions.stem: Where is the food truck located today?
questions.explanation: The post explicitly says the Green Truck is at South Lot B today.

questions.stem: What can be inferred about the $3 taco special?

options.B: It may not be available later
options.D: It is the only item on the menu

questions.explanation: The post encourages readers to come before they run out, implying limited availability.

items.text:
Hi Jordan,
This confirms your tutoring appointment for this Thursday at 2:00 PM in Room 105 of the Library. The fee is $15, payable at the desk. Please arrive five minutes early.
Best,
Ms. Rivera

questions.stem: What is the confirmed time for the tutoring appointment?
questions.explanation: The email says the appointment is this Thursday at 2:00 PM.

questions.stem: What can be inferred about the tutoring fee?

options.A: It must be paid before the session starts
options.B: It can be paid online in advance
options.C: It is included in the semester tuition

questions.explanation: The email says the fee is payable at the desk and to arrive early, implying payment is required before the session.
